Pyrog..personality: A restless, driven individual who cannot remain still and feels compelled to keep moving. They are loquacious and mentally accelerated, thinking and talking faster than usual, with a nervous energy that makes sitting intolerable.
Pyrog..mental_state: Marked confusion about bodily boundaries and personal identity — they may feel dispersed, as if covering the whole bed, or sense they become a different person when changing position. Delirium and mental fog alternate with periods of rapid, pressured thinking and heightened verbal fluency.
Pyrog..emotional_pattern: Underlying irritability dominates, with deep anxiety and a sinking dread centered around the heart. They are prone to frightful dreams and persistent, intrusive thoughts that prevent sleep, reflecting a pervasive sense of internal decay and restless unease.
